title: Discovering an Online Friend Lives in the Same City

all.en: For two years, I had been chatting with Kevin in an online community for movie lovers.
all.zh: 兩年來，我一直在一個影迷的網路社群裡和凱文聊天。

all.en: We shared reviews, recommended films, and debated about classic directors almost every day.
all.zh: 我們分享影評、推薦電影，幾乎每天都在討論經典導演。

all.en: Although we became close, I had no idea where he actually lived in real life.
all.zh: 雖然我們變得很親近，但我完全不知道他現實生活中住在哪裡。

all.en: One evening, he mentioned a small independent cinema near a famous old bookstore.
all.zh: 一天晚上，他提到了一間位於知名舊書店附近的小型獨立電影院。

all.en: My heart skipped a beat because I walked past that bookstore on my way home every day.
all.zh: 我的心跳漏了一拍，因為我每天回家的路上都會經過那間書店。

all.en: After comparing a few more landmarks, we realized we lived only ten minutes apart.
all.zh: 在比對了更多地標後，我們發現我們住的地方只相隔十分鐘。

all.en: We could hardly believe our luck and decided to meet in person that very weekend.
all.zh: 我們簡直不敢相信我們的好運，並決定就在那個週末見面。

all.en: I felt nervous walking into the cinema café, wondering if reality would match our online connection.
all.zh: 當我走進電影院的咖啡廳時，我感到緊張，想著現實是否能與我們網路上的連結相符。

all.en: To my relief, Kevin was just as funny and friendly in person as he was online.
all.zh: 令我鬆一口氣的是，凱文本人和網路上一樣風趣、友善。

all.en: We watched a black-and-white French film together and discussed it for hours afterward.
all.zh: 我們一起看了一部黑白的法國電影，之後又討論了好幾個小時。

all.en: Now we have a regular movie night, and our friendship has become even stronger offline.
all.zh: 現在我們有固定的電影之夜，而我們的友誼在線下變得更加深厚了。

all.en: On our second meetup, Kevin took me to a hidden record store I had never seen.
all.zh: 我們第二次見面時，凱文帶我去了一間我從未見過的隱藏唱片行。

all.en: The owner recognized him and chatted about a rare soundtrack from the 1960s.
all.zh: 店主認得他，並聊起了一張一九六〇年代的稀有電影原聲帶。

all.en: I bought my first vinyl record there, an old French film score he recommended.
all.zh: 我在那裡買了我的第一張黑膠唱片，是他推薦的一張舊法國電影配樂。

all.en: We started a small film club and invited a few neighbors who shared our passion.
all.zh: 我們成立了一個小型電影社團，邀請了幾位有同樣熱情的鄰居加入。

all.en: Every other Friday, six of us gather in his living room for a themed movie night.
all.zh: 每隔一個星期五，我們六個人會聚在他的客廳，舉行有主題的電影之夜。

all.en: Kevin always prepares homemade popcorn with sea salt and a touch of warm butter.
all.zh: 凱文總會準備加了海鹽和一點溫熱奶油的自製爆米花。

all.en: After the movies, we walk to a late-night noodle shop for steaming bowls of broth.
all.zh: 看完電影後，我們會走到一間深夜麵店，享用熱騰騰的湯麵。

all.en: Last month, our group even traveled together to a small film festival upstate.
all.zh: 上個月，我們這群人甚至一起去了北部一個小型影展。

all.en: It is amazing how an online chat box quietly turned into a real-life community.
all.zh: 一個網路聊天框靜靜地化為現實生活中的社群，真是令人驚奇。

all.en: I now believe that real friendships can start anywhere, even between two screens.
all.zh: 我現在相信真正的友誼可以從任何地方開始，即使是在兩個螢幕之間。

all.en: After our weekend film festival trip, our small group decided to start a community blog.
all.zh: 我們去過週末影展之後，這個小社群決定一起經營一個社區部落格。

all.en: Each member wrote one short review every week about a different classic film.
all.zh: 每位成員每週撰寫一篇關於不同經典電影的短篇影評。

all.en: Kevin designed the simple website and added a comment section for our growing readers.
all.zh: 凱文設計了這個簡潔的網站，並加入了一個給逐漸成長中的讀者留言的區域。

all.en: Within three months, our blog had hundreds of subscribers from many different cities.
all.zh: 短短三個月內，我們的部落格已有來自許多不同城市的數百名訂閱者。

all.en: A local newspaper interviewed us about the joy of building real friendships from online ones.
all.zh: 一家當地報紙採訪我們，談論從網路情誼建立真實友誼的喜悅。

all.en: Inspired by our story, two readers met in person and later organized their own film club.
all.zh: 受我們故事啟發，有兩位讀者也親自見面，後來自己成立了一個電影社團。

all.en: Kevin and I co-hosted a small festival at the independent cinema where we first met.
all.zh: 凱文和我一起在我們最初相識的獨立電影院舉辦了一場小型影展。

all.en: Tickets sold out within two days, and the owner thanked us with a personal letter.
all.zh: 票券在兩天內售罄，戲院老闆還親筆寫信感謝我們。

all.en: During the festival, I introduced Kevin to my parents, who finally understood our long friendship.
all.zh: 影展期間，我把凱文介紹給我的父母，他們終於明白我們這段長久的友誼。

all.en: What began as anonymous chat had quietly grown into a small, warm, real-world family.
all.zh: 從匿名聊天開始的關係，竟悄悄成長為一個小而溫暖的真實大家庭。
